name: Pumpkin-Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar, cornstarch, cinnamon, and salt in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Stir in the water and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Carefully add the apple slices and cook for another 4 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside.
4. In a bowl, combine the egg, sugar, pumpkin, salt, spices (cinnamon, ginger, clove), and evaporated milk.
5. Beat until well blended using a rotary or electric mixer on low speed.
6. Pour the apple mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
7. Spoon an even layer of the pumpkin mixture over the apple mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 375°F and bake another 40 minutes or until the filling is set around the edge.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
